# Audit.ai

> AI-powered product analysis. Describe your product, get a full audit report in minutes. Used by founders and indie developers pre-launch.

Audit.ai generates structured quality reports covering UX, payments, security, and more from your product description. Each audit is one credit; pricing starts at €1.25 per audit.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Audit.ai and how the audit flow works.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Credit-based pricing plans, from €1.25 per audit.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about credits, accuracy, and data safety.

## Optional

- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of Audit.ai.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we collect, process, and protect your data.
- [Legal Notice](/legal): Publisher, hosting, and contact details.
